title: Foxbook capability taxonomy (v1)
description: Frozen v1 capability taxonomy — 22 IDs hand-curated from foundation §6.8 + A2A v0.3.0 SDK skill examples. Scraped-AgentCard cross-ref is a week-2 revisit; the scraper is Day 5.5+. Additions within v1.x require an ADR (0003 pending). Capability IDs deliberately use compound forms (text-translation, audio-transcription, text-summarization, ocr-extraction) rather than bare nouns (translation, transcription, summarization, ocr) to stay compatible with the service-agnostic-core banned-literal rule — compound IDs carry modality context AND are structurally immune to the regex check in scripts/check-core-isolation.mjs.

capabilityId.description: One of 22 frozen v1 capability IDs. Additive v1.x bumps require an ADR; breaking changes require a v2 schema file.
